response: "I’ll use Netflix pages first to verify availability, then public metadata/review pages to compare quality and episode counts. I’ll keep the final evidence tabs open when I’m done."

"I found Netflix’s public “TV Mysteries” genre page and it’s much richer than the homepage: it lists dozens of available series across TV mysteries, crime TV dramas, international, sci-fi, true crime, and “watch in one weekend” rows. I’m building the candidate pool from that page now."

action_line: websearch("\"objective\":\"Find public ratings and episode counts for Dark Netflix TV series from IMDb or Rotten Tomatoes\",\"search_queries\":[\"Dark Netflix IMDb rating\",\"Dark Rotten Tomatoes episodes\",\"Dark Netflix series seasons\"],\"mode\":\"basic\"")
response: "{\"session_id\":\"q0pd5tkInndxSrUW\",\"results\":[{\"source_id\":\"VGe740pnIwRxssYqHYNMd\",\"url\":\"https://www.imdb.com/title/tt5753856/\",\"title\":\"Dark (TV Series 2017–2020) - IMDb\",\"publish_date\":null,\"excerpts\":[\"But in many ways it does the opposite of what \\\"Stranger Things\\\" does. It doesn't work with likable characters. Nostalgia is not something you will find here. It's just a deep dark show, which has much to offer to people who love psychological horror, without the gory parts. This show is not for everyone. I think the best comparison to make is with \\\"Twin Peaks\\\". A show that leaves you behind every episode with a big what-the-f\\\\*ck feeling. The constant eerie feeling, as if someone is constantly playing with your thoughts. My god the creators do everything so right. It has been a long time since I have seen something so original, and executed so well.  \\n  \\nI'm pretty sure this show will live up, and will be right there between the greatest cult ...[truncated 26547 chars]...mily trees to maintain an interest in what's happening to the people of Winden.\\nGo to Full Review Mark Serrels CNET 03/28/2023 Three seasons of perfect television, available on a streaming service you most likely already subscribe to. Dark won't disappoint you, or turn like Game of Thrones. It won't end unfinished like Deadwood, or make zero sense like Westworld. Go to Full Review Victor Pineyro Seventh Art Studio 10/22/2021\\n\\n8/10\\n\\nDark's last season overcomplicates the time travel experience but in some weird way creates an emotional goodbye to this technically incredible show. [Full review in Spanish] Go to Full Review Fausto Ponce Alta Fidelidad Magazine 03/02/2021 Is it too early to say that Dark is one of the best series of the century so far? I don't believe so. [Full review in Spanish] Go to Full Review Read all reviews\\n\\n## Audience Reviews\\n\\nView More\\n\\nAdiyakhuu N @RT31808176 2d It has a lot of questions answered, and makes you think again and again.\"]}]}"

action_line: repl("Testing IMDb suggestions", "async function imdbSuggest2(q){ const l=q.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g,'').slice(0,1) || 'x'; const url=`https://v3.sg.media-imdb.com/suggestion/${l}/${encodeURIComponent(q)}.json`; const r=await fetch(url); console.log(url, r.status); const j=await r.json(); return j.d?.slice(0,5).map(x=>({id:x.id,l:x.l,q:x.q,y:x.y,yr:x.yr,s:x.s})); }\nconsole.log(JSON.stringify(await imdbSuggest2('The Chestnut Man'), null, 2));\nconsole.log(JSON.stringify(await imdbSuggest2('MINDHUNTER'), null, 2));")
